summary.shape_sentence: Gap-and-go style bullish trend day: sharp opening markup, brief digestion, then steady stair-step advance into a near-high close.

goat.note: Opening burst out of the RTH open zone into the first major high around 25,560.

red_circles.behavior: Marked local bearish pivots into overhead supply; produced pauses and shallow retracements but did not reverse the day.

green_circles.behavior: Repeatedly marked higher-low long pivots; buyers reasserted control after each dip and kept the trend intact.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply stacked around 25,540-25,570 and later 25,600-25,660; early layers were absorbed and broken, while final upper supply was only lightly respected near the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand rose from roughly 25,480-25,520 into 25,560-25,620; most tests held and supported continuation.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening expansion had just peaked and was transitioning into the first pullback from the morning drive.
time_markers.12pm_red: Constructive midday consolidation/reclaim, holding above morning support with bullish bias intact.
time_markers.2pm_green: Trend continuation state; price was already elevated and started another cleaner push higher.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near the high after sustained upward stair-stepping and no meaningful late-day unwind.

takeaway: Bullish trend day with an opening expansion, a controlled post-open reset, and persistent higher-low support all session.
